purpose: Structured Almere input objects for the regional AZWA/D5-D6 workagenda process.

sender.role: local input provider for regional workagenda

regional_process_owner.role: prepare regional workagenda with regional partners

primary_municipality_delivery_target.description: Main municipality-facing target date for Almere to deliver structured input to the regional workagenda process.
primary_municipality_delivery_target.why_it_matters: The regional coordinator needs time after municipal delivery to consolidate local input before the formal regional adoption deadline.

formal_workagenda_deadline.primary_audience: regional coordinator and college adoption process

almere_internal_submission_target.description: Target date for Almere to send structured input to the regional workagenda process

summary.date_priority_note: Municipality-facing outputs should surface 2026-09-15 as the main delivery target for Almere input to the region. 2026-11-15 is the later regional adoption deadline.
summary.status_note: Objects support concept handoff with visible gaps; they do not make any component a confirmed Almere position unless confirmed_position_ready is true.

municipality_delivery_to_region.description: Main target date for Almere to deliver structured concept input for this component to the regional workagenda process.
municipality_delivery_to_region.why_before_regional_deadline: Regional coordination needs time to consolidate municipal input before the 2026-11-15 formal adoption deadline.

almere_submission.target_delivery_to_region_note: For Almere and other municipalities, this is the main delivery target for input to the regional process; 15 November is the later regional adoption deadline.

almere_policy_input.summary_for_region: Almere can send Laagdrempelige steunpunten as concept input for the regional workagenda, with public-source foundation and explicit unresolved validation, finance, governance, decision and D6-dependency gaps.
almere_policy_input.proposed_workagenda_position: Use as concept D5 input with validation gaps. Do not write as a confirmed Almere workagenda position until local validation, finance/controller check, governance ownership and D6 dependency mapping are resolved or explicitly escalated.
almere_policy_input.drafting_guardrail: Concept input is not a confirmed local policy position or final regional workagenda text.

known_from_public_sources: GGD-indicatoren voor eenzaamheid, angst/depressierisico en broze gezondheid geven publieke urgentiesignalen.

what_region_needs_from_almere: validated current local status and coverage
validated owner, coordinator, executor and partner roles
finance/controller confirmation for funding route and continuity
D6 dependency status and any critical prerequisites
decision or phasing route toward regional workagenda drafting
minimum_viable_input: component title and D5 classification
public evidence basis from the status matrix
explicit unresolved gaps
priority validation questions and ticket IDs
safe handoff wording that avoids confirmed-position claims
not_needed_in_first_submission: full validation workbook answer set
final finance/controller proof for every unresolved field
confirmed governance mandate where it has not yet been validated
final college-adopted workagenda wording

main_gaps.needed_for_region: validated funding route and continuity status
validated owner, coordinator, executor and mandate
validated local coverage, capacity and constraints
validated monitoring, data owner and learning-cycle arrangement
decision owner, phasing route and status before final drafting
validated D6 dependency map and any critical prerequisites for this D5 component
Prioritisation and phasing toward 2030 need a local or regional decision.
explicit validation, decision or evidence path before final workagenda use
Funding line, structural/project status and double-counting must be checked by finance/controller.
explicit validation, decision or evidence path before final workagenda use
Owner, coordinator, executor and mandate must be locally validated.
explicit validation, decision or evidence path before final workagenda use
explicit validation, decision or evidence path before final workagenda use
Monitoring arrangement, data/reporting owner and learning-cycle accountability need confirmation.
explicit validation, decision or evidence path before final workagenda use
D6 prerequisites must be mapped explicitly before drafting.
Open decisions remain and must become validation, finance or decision tickets.
explicit validation, decision or evidence path before final workagenda use
explicit validation, decision or evidence path before final workagenda use
explicit validation, decision or evidence path before final workagenda use
explicit validation, decision or evidence path before final workagenda use

decision_requests_for_region.question: Confirm the regional or Almere decision route for prioritering_2027_2030 before this becomes a confirmed workagenda position.
Confirm the regional or Almere decision route for lokale_eigenaar before this becomes a confirmed workagenda position.
Confirm the regional or Almere decision route for budget before this becomes a confirmed workagenda position.
Confirm the regional or Almere decision route for monitoringafspraak before this becomes a confirmed workagenda position.
Confirm the regional or Almere decision route for formele_besluitstatus before this becomes a confirmed workagenda position.

priority_questions.question: Wat is de actuele lokale invulling, dekking en capaciteit voor Laagdrempelige steunpunten?
Wie is eigenaar, coordinator, uitvoerder en partner voor Laagdrempelige steunpunten?
Welke financiering geldt voor Laagdrempelige steunpunten, en is die structureel, tijdelijk of gemengd?
Welke D6-infrastructuur is randvoorwaardelijk voor Laagdrempelige steunpunten?
Welk besluit of welke fasering is nodig om Laagdrempelige steunpunten richting 2027-2030 op te nemen?

finance_input.to_send_to_region: Finance/controller route and continuity status must remain explicit validation items.

monitoring_input.to_send_to_region: Send candidate monitoring signals as validation needs, not as a settled monitoring arrangement.

d6_dependency_input.to_send_to_region: Send as possible or unresolved D6 dependencies unless validation confirms otherwise.

risk_assessment.overall: Usable for concept handoff with visible validation gaps.
risk_assessment.risk_to_submission: Low if sent as concept input with explicit gaps; higher if framed as confirmed.
risk_assessment.risk_to_final_workagenda: Blocking gaps remain until validation, finance/controller, governance and D6 dependency questions are resolved.

handoff_to_region.recommended_wording: Almere ziet Laagdrempelige steunpunten als een relevant D5-onderdeel voor de regionale werkagenda. Openbare bronnen geven een deels basis voor opname. Almere kan dit als conceptinput aanleveren, maar ownership, finance, capacity, monitoring, D6 dependencies, decision/phasing moeten nog worden gevalideerd voordat dit als bevestigde werkagendapositie kan worden gebruikt.

attachments_or_links.label: D5 status matrix row
attachments_or_links.use: component status, evidence, gaps and risk

attachments_or_links.label: D5 validation tickets
attachments_or_links.use: priority validation questions

not_to_include_in_first_handoff: unvalidated stakeholder answers
claims that funding, ownership, capacity or D6 dependencies are confirmed
full workbook choice sets unless the recipient needs the detailed validation instrument

source_refs.title: Handvatten voor het opstellen van de regionale werkagenda

public_evidence: GGD-indicatoren voor eenzaamheid, angst/depressierisico en broze gezondheid geven publieke urgentiesignalen.
evidence_limitations: Generated data layers are not public sources.
Public-source signals do not equal confirmed local policy, finance, ownership or capacity.
The 2026-09-15 Almere submission target is the main municipality-facing delivery target for sending input to the region, but remains a planning assumption rather than the national formal deadline.
The 2026-11-15 date is the regional college-adoption deadline; it should not be presented as the main municipality delivery date.

traceability.safe_public_use: Use as internal/regional handoff preparation with explicit gaps; do not cite as source evidence.

CBS 2025 denominator maakt een eerste indicatieve Almere-rekensom mogelijk.

known_signals: Ketendocument contains finance/declaration signals, but controller validation and continuity status remain unresolved.
finance_input.to_send_to_region: Finance/controller route and continuity status must remain explicit validation items.

candidate_indicators: ketendocument monitoring and registration signals, still to be validated
monitoring_input.to_send_to_region: Send candidate monitoring signals as validation needs, not as a settled monitoring arrangement.

d6_dependency_input.to_send_to_region: Send as possible or unresolved D6 dependencies unless validation confirms otherwise.

risk_assessment.overall: Usable for concept handoff with visible validation gaps.
risk_assessment.risk_to_submission: Low if sent as concept input with explicit gaps; higher if framed as confirmed.
risk_assessment.risk_to_final_workagenda: Blocking gaps remain until validation, finance/controller, governance and D6 dependency questions are resolved.

handoff_to_region.recommended_wording: Almere ziet valpreventie als een logisch D5-onderdeel voor de regionale werkagenda. Openbare bronnen tonen een bestaande uitvoeringsroute met inloop, risico-inschatting en cursusmatching. Voor definitieve werkagendavorming moeten eigenaarschap, financiering, capaciteit, monitoring en D6-afhankelijkheden nog gericht worden gevalideerd.

source_refs.title: Handvatten voor het opstellen van de regionale werkagenda

public_evidence: CBS 2025 geeft publieke leeftijdsdenominatoren; lokale coalitie-, capaciteit- en interventiekeuzes zijn nog invulvelden.
evidence_limitations: Generated data layers are not public sources.
Public-source signals do not equal confirmed local policy, finance, ownership or capacity.
The 2026-09-15 Almere submission target is the main municipality-facing delivery target for sending input to the region, but remains a planning assumption rather than the national formal deadline.
The 2026-11-15 date is the regional college-adoption deadline; it should not be presented as the main municipality delivery date.

Welke financiering geldt voor Ketenaanpak overgewicht en obesitas kinderen, en is die structureel, tijdelijk of gemengd?
Welke D6-infrastructuur is randvoorwaardelijk voor Ketenaanpak overgewicht en obesitas kinderen?
Welk besluit of welke fasering is nodig om Ketenaanpak overgewicht en obesitas kinderen richting 2027-2030 op te nemen?

finance_input.to_send_to_region: Finance/controller route and continuity status must remain explicit validation items.

monitoring_input.to_send_to_region: Send candidate monitoring signals as validation needs, not as a settled monitoring arrangement.

d6_dependency_input.to_send_to_region: Send as possible or unresolved D6 dependencies unless validation confirms otherwise.

risk_assessment.overall: High risk for final workagenda use until validation and decisions are resolved.
risk_assessment.risk_to_submission: Low if sent as concept input with explicit gaps; higher if framed as confirmed.
risk_assessment.risk_to_final_workagenda: Blocking gaps remain until validation, finance/controller, governance and D6 dependency questions are resolved.

handoff_to_region.recommended_wording: Almere ziet Ketenaanpak overgewicht en obesitas kinderen als een relevant D5-onderdeel voor de regionale werkagenda. Openbare bronnen geven een zwak basis voor opname. Almere kan dit als conceptinput aanleveren, maar ownership, finance, capacity, monitoring, D6 dependencies, decision/phasing moeten nog worden gevalideerd voordat dit als bevestigde werkagendapositie kan worden gebruikt.

source_refs.title: Handvatten voor het opstellen van de regionale werkagenda

public_evidence: CBS 2025 geeft publieke jeugdleeftijdsdenominatoren; specifieke jeugdgezondheids- en CZV/kinder-GLI-capaciteit is nog invulveld.
evidence_limitations: Generated data layers are not public sources.
Public-source signals do not equal confirmed local policy, finance, ownership or capacity.
The 2026-09-15 Almere submission target is the main municipality-facing delivery target for sending input to the region, but remains a planning assumption rather than the national formal deadline.
The 2026-11-15 date is the regional college-adoption deadline; it should not be presented as the main municipality delivery date.

traceability.safe_public_use: Use as internal/regional handoff preparation with explicit gaps; do not cite as source evidence.

objects.title: Ontwikkelagenda 1 nieuw: dementie, nicotinevrij, rookvrije start, multiproblematiek NPLV

municipality_delivery_to_region.description: Main target date for Almere to deliver structured concept input for this component to the regional workagenda process.
municipality_delivery_to_region.why_before_regional_deadline: Regional coordination needs time to consolidate municipal input before the 2026-11-15 formal adoption deadline.

almere_submission.target_delivery_to_region_note: For Almere and other municipalities, this is the main delivery target for input to the regional process; 15 November is the later regional adoption deadline.

almere_policy_input.summary_for_region: Almere can only send Ontwikkelagenda 1 nieuw: dementie, nicotinevrij, rookvrije start, multiproblematiek NPLV as a scope-choice item unless Almere or the region chooses to include it.
almere_policy_input.proposed_workagenda_position: Use as optional scope input only. Do not include as a required D5 position without an explicit scope decision and follow-up validation route.
almere_policy_input.drafting_guardrail: Concept input is not a confirmed local policy position or final regional workagenda text.

known_from_public_sources: Alleen vullen wanneer publieke bron of lokale validatie aangeeft dat Almere/Flevoland deze aanpak in de praktijk wil uitproberen.
